title: EcfrCorrection
description: An eCFR correction record representing an editorial or substantive correction applied to the Code of Federal Regulations.

cfr_references.description: CFR references affected by this correction.

hierarchy.description: Structured hierarchy identifiers for the affected content.

corrected_date.description: Date on which the correction was made (YYYY-MM-DD).

error_corrected_date.description: Date on which the error was corrected (YYYY-MM-DD).

error_occurred_date.description: Date on which the error originally occurred (YYYY-MM-DD).

fr_citation.description: Federal Register citation for the correction.

display_in_toc.description: Whether this correction should display in the table of contents.

title.description: CFR title number affected by this correction.

corrective_action.description: Description of the corrective action taken.

year.description: Year in which the correction was published.

last_modified.description: Timestamp of last modification to this correction record.
